name: Auth0 Duplicate Account Emails
description: Detects duplicate active auth0 accounts sharing the same email identity.
query: SELECT LOWER(TRIM(u.email)) AS email, COUNT(*) AS account_count FROM auth0_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.blocked, false) = false AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.email), '') != '' GROUP BY LOWER(TRIM(u.email)) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
remediation: Consolidate duplicate identities and remove unintended duplicate access paths.
